CommunityApplications.Profile:
# YAHLP - Yet Another HomeLab Portal Templates
Unraid container templates for YAHLP (Yet Another HomeLab Portal), a comprehensive reverse proxy and unified media server dashboard for homelab environments.
## What's Included
This repository contains 4 pre-configured Unraid container templates for different deployment scenarios:
- **yahlp-private-basic.xml** - Private mode (HTTP) with HTTP Basic Authentication - **yahlp-public-basic.xml** - Public mode (HTTPS) with HTTP Basic Authentication - **yahlp-public-google.xml** - Public mode (HTTPS) with Google OAuth2 Authentication - **yahlp-public-entra.xml** - Public mode (HTTPS) with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) OAuth2 Authentication
## Key Features
- **19 Integrated Services** - Radarr, Sonarr, Lidarr, Whisparr, Prowlarr, Jackett, Seerr, Bazarr, SABnzbd, NZBGet, NZBHydra, Transmission, qBittorrent, Deluge, Jellyfin, Plex, Emby, Tautulli, Maintainerr - **4 Dashboard Styles** - Classic, Modern, Sleek, Minimal (with mobile-responsive layout) - **Dark/Light Theme Toggle** - Persistent user preferences with theme persistence - **Minimal Defaults** - All services disabled by default; users enable only what they need - **Torrent/Usenet Links** - 15 pre-configured sites (torrent and usenet) with cached favicons - **Multiple Authentication Methods** - None, Basic Auth, Google OAuth2, Microsoft Entra ID - **Automatic HTTPS** - Let's Encrypt integration for public deployments - **Subdomain Routing** - Support for media service subdomains in public mode - **Additional vhost support** - map additional vhost files to the configuration to be served by the reverse proxy, without adding to the menu
## Getting Started
1. Choose a template based on your deployment mode: - **Private Network?** → Use `yahlp-private-basic.xml` - **Public with Passwords?** → Use `yahlp-public-basic.xml` - **Public with Google Accounts?** → Use `yahlp-public-google.xml` - **Public with Microsoft/Enterprise?** → Use `yahlp-public-entra.xml`
2. In Unraid, go to `Docker` → `Add Container` → `Select a template`
3. Load the template and configure your deployment settings
4. Enable the services you need and configure their backend URLs
## Documentation
- **Main Repository:** https://github.com/auskento/yahlp - **Setup Guide:** See the main repository README for comprehensive setup and configuration instructions - **Support:** Visit the main repository for issues, feature requests, and questions
## License
These templates are part of the YAHLP project. See the LICENSE file for details.
